requirement: [Memory Allocation] Support alignment requirements of 256 bytes, 4KB, 64KB, and 2MB page sizes

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation support for 256 bytes alignment requirement
steps: Allocate memory with 256 bytes alignment requirement
test_cases.expected_result: Memory allocation with 256 bytes alignment requirement should succeed

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation support for 4KB alignment requirement
test_cases.expected_result: Memory allocation with 4KB alignment requirement should succeed

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation support for 64KB alignment requirement
test_cases.expected_result: Memory allocation with 64KB alignment requirement should succeed

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation support for 2MB alignment requirement
test_cases.expected_result: Memory allocation with 2MB alignment requirement should succeed

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation support for edge cases like 1 byte alignment
steps: Allocate memory with 1 byte alignment requirement
test_cases.expected_result: Memory allocation with 1 byte alignment requirement should fail or be adjusted
